name: Verify Fix & Update Docs
description: After agent stops: verify the fix actually works with a real test, then update docs — game kb.h for game-specific findings, tool-catalog.md only if a reusable tool changed.
agentPrompt:
The agent just stopped. Do the following in order:

1. VERIFY: Run a real functional test on whatever was changed this session — not just 'no diagnostics'. Exercise the actual code path and report the output. If gamectl was involved, run `python -m livetools gamectl --exe <game.exe> info` and a key sequence test.

2. CONFIRM: State clearly — working or still broken. If broken, state the next concrete step.

3. UPDATE DOCS (scoped correctly):
   - Game-specific findings (addresses, structs, pitfalls) → update `patches/<GameName>/kb.h`
   - FFP porting findings → update `.kiro/steering/dx9-ffp-port.md` if it's a general pattern
   - Reusable tool changes (retools/, livetools/, graphics/) → update `.kiro/steering/tool-catalog.md`
   - Game-specific scripts in patches/<GameName>/ → never go in tool-catalog.md
